workflow_type.name: type:complete
workflow_type.description: Full complete workflow (plan → build → test → review → document → ship)

workflow_type.name: type:complete-auto
workflow_type.description: Auto-mode complete workflow (accumulate shipping, no per-slice PRs)

workflow_type.name: type:patch-auto
workflow_type.description: Auto-mode patch workflow (accumulate shipping, no per-slice PRs)

workflow_type.name: type:document
workflow_type.description: Documentation workflow - generate or update documentation

workflow_type.name: type:document-auto
workflow_type.description: Auto-mode documentation workflow (accumulate shipping, no per-slice PRs)

workflow_type.name: type:generate
workflow_type.description: Generation workflow - create new issues, code, or artifacts

workflow_type.name: type:generate-auto
workflow_type.description: Auto-mode generation workflow for opt-in generate automation

workflow_type.name: type:planner
workflow_type.description: Planner workflow - rough scope intake and planning automation

model.name: model:light
model.description: Use light/fast model set (haiku) for simple issues

model.name: model:base
model.description: Use base model set (sonnet) for processing

model.name: model:heavy
model.description: Use heavy/slow model set (opus) for complex issues

category.name: maintenance
category.description: Maintenance work - refactoring, technical debt, testing

agent.name: agent
agent.description: Created or managed by ADW automation

agent.name: blocked
agent.description: Blocked - review required before ADW can process

agent.name: adw:in-progress
agent.description: ADW workflow actively processing - remove to re-trigger

shutdown.name: adw:shutdown-system
shutdown.description: System-level shutdown - terminates all workflows and exits cron

auto_mode.name: auto:enabled
auto_mode.description: Auto-mode eligible - scheduler will dispatch this issue

auto_mode.name: auto:pause
auto_mode.description: Auto-mode paused - operator signal for paused issues

pr_request.name: request:review
pr_request.description: Request AI code review (no code changes)

pr_request.name: request:fix
pr_request.description: Request AI to implement review suggestions

pr_request.name: request:review-fix
pr_request.description: Request AI review followed by fixes

pr_request.name: request:plan-fix
pr_request.description: Request AI to apply follow-up fixes for planner output

branch.name: branch:develop
branch.description: Target develop branch for integration workflows

branch.name: branch:epic
branch.description: Target epic branch for coordinated efforts

branch.name: branch:feature
branch.description: Target feature branch for focused changes
